source_text: Take flight as Squawkabilly makes its Pokemon GO debut! The Flying Taxi event will take place from June 23, 2026 at 10 am to June 29, 2026 at 8 pm.
Squawkabilly, the Parrot Pokemon, will make its Pokemon GO debut! You'll be able to encounter Squawkabilly from Field Research or in the wild.
Squawkabilly has four different plumage forms:
Note: Green Plumage Squawkabilly appears in the Eastern Hemisphere and Blue Plumage Squawkabilly appears in the Western Hemisphere.
